mapper.select: select a.write_year , a.doc_type , a.doc_no , a.tbm_date , substring(a.tbm_date, 5, 2) as tbm_month , a.work_nm , a.work_place , a.work_desc , (select hr_nm from esg.tb_approval_info where target_type = a.doc_type and target_id = a.write_year||a.doc_no and type = 'leader') as leader , (select count(*) from esg.tb_approval_info where target_type = a.doc_type and target_id = a.write_year||a.doc_no and type = 'attend') as attend , a.use_yn from esg.tb_toolboxmeeting a where 1 = 1 and a.comp_id = #{compId} and substring(a.write_year, 1, 4) = #{writeYear} order by substring(a.tbm_date, 1, 4) desc, case when a.use_yn = 'Y' then 0 else 1 end, a.tbm_date desc, a.doc_no asc

select a.write_year , a.doc_type , a.doc_no , a.tbm_date , substring(a.tbm_time_stt, 1, 2)||':'||substring(a.tbm_time_stt, 3, 2) ||' ~ '|| substring(a.tbm_time_end, 1, 2)||':'||substring(a.tbm_time_end, 3, 2) as tbm_time , a.tbm_time_stt , a.tbm_time_end , a.same_date_yn , a.created_at , a.use_yn , a.work_nm , a.work_desc , a.work_place , a.risk_yn , a.check_result , a.work_end_meeting from esg.tb_toolboxmeeting a where write_year = #{writeYear} and doc_type = #{docType} and doc_no = #{docNo}

select a.write_year , a.doc_type , a.doc_no , a.doc_seq , a.risk , a.measures from esg.tb_toolboxmeeting_potentialrisk a where a.write_year = #{writeYear} and a.doc_type = #{docType} and a.doc_no = #{docNo} order by a.write_year, a.doc_type, a.doc_no, a.doc_seq

select a.write_year , a.doc_type , a.doc_no , a.doc_seq , a.potential_risk_seq , a.measures from esg.tb_toolboxmeeting_keyrisk a where a.write_year = #{writeYear} and a.doc_type = #{docType} and a.doc_no = #{docNo} order by a.write_year, a.doc_type, a.doc_no, a.doc_seq

select a.write_year , a.doc_type , a.doc_no , a.doc_seq , a.potential_risk_seq , (case when nullif(a.potential_risk_seq, '') is not null then b.risk else a.risk end) as risk , a.action_yn , a.action from esg.tb_toolboxmeeting_safecheck a left join esg.tb_toolboxmeeting_potentialrisk b on b.write_year = a.write_year and b.doc_type = a.doc_type and b.doc_no = a.doc_no and b.doc_seq = a.potential_risk_seq where a.write_year = #{writeYear} and a.doc_type = #{docType} and a.doc_no = #{docNo} order by a.write_year, a.doc_type, a.doc_no, a.doc_seq

select to_char(to_date(a.tbm_date, 'yyyymmdd'), 'yyyy년 mm월 dd일') ||' '||substring(a.tbm_time_stt, 1, 2)||':'||substring(a.tbm_time_stt, 3, 2) ||' ~ '||substring(a.tbm_time_end, 1, 2)||':'||substring(a.tbm_time_end, 3, 2) as tbm_date , a.same_date_yn , a.work_nm , a.work_desc , a.work_place , a.risk_yn , a.check_result , a.work_end_meeting from esg.tb_toolboxmeeting a where 1 = 1 and a.write_year = #{writeYear} and a.doc_type = #{docType} and a.doc_no = #{docNo}

select b.risk , a.measures from esg.tb_toolboxmeeting_keyrisk a left join esg.tb_toolboxmeeting_potentialrisk b on b.write_year = a.write_year and b.doc_type = a.doc_type and b.doc_no = a.doc_no and b.doc_seq = a.potential_risk_seq where 1 = 1 and a.write_year = #{writeYear} and a.doc_type = #{docType} and a.doc_no = #{docNo}

-- 출력물에 번호를 넣기위해 ROW_NUMBER 추가 select ROW_NUMBER() OVER () || '. ' || (case when nullif(a.potential_risk_seq, '') is not null then b.risk else a.risk end) as risk , a.action_yn , a.action from esg.tb_toolboxmeeting_safecheck a left join esg.tb_toolboxmeeting_potentialrisk b on b.write_year = a.write_year and b.doc_type = a.doc_type and b.doc_no = a.doc_no and b.doc_seq = a.potential_risk_seq where 1 = 1 and a.write_year = #{writeYear} and a.doc_type = #{docType} and a.doc_no = #{docNo}

SELECT a.*, CONCAT(trap.plan_nm, ' (', toi.orgn_nm, ')') AS riskNm, trap.risk_allowance_standards, trap.cpem_write_year, trap.cpem_doc_no, b.process_nm, c.process_work_rev_no AS rev_no FROM esg.tb_toolboxmeeting_risk_assessment a LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_plan trap ON trap.write_year = a.risk_write_year AND trap.doc_type = a.risk_doc_type AND trap.doc_no = a.risk_doc_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info toi ON trap.orgn_id = toi.orgn_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds e ON e.orgn_id = toi.orgn_id AND e.write_year = trap.cpem_write_year AND e.doc_no = trap.cpem_doc_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds_analysis b ON a.process_id = b.process_id AND e.write_year = b.write_year AND e.doc_no = b.doc_no AND e.doc_type = b.doc_type LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_hazards c ON a.process_id = c.process_id AND a.write_year = c.write_year AND c.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE a.write_year = #{writeYear} AND a.doc_type = #{docType} AND a.doc_no = #{docNo}
